why_wrong: Analysis Aware Noise Metric: keeps the main datapath plausible while reporting the wrong metric value.
Analysis Aware Noise Metric: uses a shifted or inverted decision condition that can pass one mode but fails boundary cases.
Analysis Aware Noise Metric: implements a plausible but incomplete behavior that passes shallow checks and fails the full visible/hidden contract.

Analysis Aware Noise Metric: uses a wrong gain or scale factor, leaving shape plausible while calibrated checks fail.
